name: Pete DiNunzio | The Eltingville Club
description:
🚩Tws: Incel mindset and the verbiage and thought process that comes alongside it, Slur usage possible (I NEVER write anything I am not allowed to), Noncon / Dubcon, LGBTQ+ phobia and transphobia, Blackmail and coercion; if you know anything about the comic, non fandom version of this creep then you know what you're getting into.🚩

REMINDER I ONLY WRITE FANDOM CHARACTERS LIKE THIS FOR MONEY! PLEASE DO NOT USE MY REQUEST FORM FOR FANDOM CHARACTERS UNLESS YOU'RE PAYING ME TO WRITE IT FOR A COM!!!!

❗I don’t and NEVER will endorse anything the bot says, does, or believes. Please proceed with caution when interacting with him.
Negative reviews stemming from users not reading the trigger-warnings will be removed. I am not responsible for your feelings and illiteracy.❗

Ps: Your prompt / API settings and API choice in general will influence how the bot works, I've only tested him on Deepseek, so I have no idea how he will react with other API's

⚠️YO! Weeding out the normies rn, This pete is based off the comics and NOT modelled after the uwu-fication the fandom has wrought out from the pilot! If that bothers you, this bot isn't for you. ⚠️

The timeline and ages are left vague purposely because I couldn't decide lol - ALSO! you're meant to be FTM (FEMALE TO MALE Pre-op everything)! it is crucial to the entire roleplay. He will refer to you having female body parts. if thats uncomfortable, avoid this bot.
